description_long: This is a vibrant athletic running shoe featuring a bright yellow-green mesh upper with dynamic black and gray accent lines that create a sense of motion. The shoe has a low-cut profile with a padded black collar and heel counter for comfort and support. The lacing system is standard criss-cross with black and white laces threaded through reinforced eyelets. The midsole is white and appears cushioned, designed for shock absorption, while the outsole is a matching yellow-green with subtle tread for grip. A stylized, silver-gray logo is present on the side, adding a distinctive branding element. The overall construction suggests breathability, flexibility, and durability, suitable for urban environments and active use.
description: A bright yellow-green athletic running shoe with black and gray accents, a cushioned white midsole, and a dynamic, sporty design. Features a side logo and standard criss-cross lacing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dynamic black and gray accent lines, silver-gray logo, and the full profile of the shoe's upper and midsole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded black heel counter and the rounded shape of the heel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the accent lines, logo, and the curvature of the sole.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the criss-cross lacing, toe box, and the symmetrical design of the upper.
attribute_logo: stylized silver-gray geometric logo on the side panel
